source_filing: The Coca-Cola Company 10-K (CIK 21344), fiscal year ended December 31, 2025
original_text: Unit case volume in EMEA increased 3%, which included 2% growth in Trademark Coca-Cola, 3% growth in sparkling flavors, 2% growth in water, sports, coffee and tea as well as growth in energy drinks.
modified_text: Coca-Cola's worldwide unit case volume increased 3% in 2025, driven by growth across Trademark Coca-Cola, sparkling flavors, water, sports, coffee and tea, and energy drinks.
claim: Total companywide unit case volume grew 3% in 2025.
citation_as_written: The Coca-Cola Company 10-K, FY2025, MD&A — Unit Case Volume
notes: Scope expansion that crosses into a false figure: the 3% applies to EMEA only; worldwide unit case volume was roughly flat. Stating 'total companywide ... grew 3%' asserts a number the source contradicts -> unsupported (relabeled from partially_supported; the engine's call is correct, parallels tc_013).
